items.name: Hybrid-SINDy-EnKF-Chikungunya
items.description: A hybrid scientific machine learning framework integrating Sparse Identification of Nonlinear Dynamics (SINDy) and the Ensemble Kalman Filter (EnKF) to learn Chikungunya dynamics from incomplete, noisy, and partially observed epidemiological data. Inspired by recent advances in SINDy-based system identification and Kalman-filter data assimilation.
